title: ReproAssert public benchmark case
description: Generator-visible metadata for one frozen historical issue. Evaluator-only fix and gold-test data are deliberately excluded.

id.description: Neutral benchmark ID that does not encode a fixing pull request.

base_sha.description: Exact full Git commit SHA of the buggy repository state.

difficulty.description: Upstream human fix-effort bucket; not an estimate of ReproAssert runtime.

smoke.description: Whether this case belongs to the five-case harness smoke subset.
